name: crmed
description: Sistema Inteligente de Relacionamento e Performance Clínica - Hospital São Rafael

scripts.infra:up: cd infra/docker && docker-compose up -d postgres redis evolution-api
scripts.infra:dev: pnpm infra:up && pnpm --filter @crmed/database db:push && pnpm --filter @crmed/database db:seed && concurrently "cd infra/docker && docker-compose logs -f evolution-api" "pnpm dev"

author: Grupo Moskitto
